prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年第109位→2026年第107位，近年稳中有升，整体处于全国中上水平；该校在声 誉文件中未出现明显负面或正面事件，舆情平稳；抖音热度排名第93位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台关注度中等，未出现异常报考信号；无投档断档历史记录；第五轮学科评估数据中未收录该校A-及以上学科，但该校以工科见长，电气工程、机械工程、材料科学等传统优势学科在行业内认可度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及 其自动化（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）等工科专业社会热度持续走高，与该校工科特色匹配度高，有利于吸引优质生源；重庆市2026年普通高 考总人数约209000人，按近年物理类占比约66%估算，物理类考生约138000人，较2025年（139478人）略降约1%，竞争基数微降；河北工业大学主校区位于天津 市，在重庆属于跨省招生，无本地生源倾斜；该校在重庆招生规模较小（约37人），地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类大幅扩招（+27.6%）是影响位 次的最关键因素，扩招直接降低了竞争烈度，推动位次数字明显后移；同时工科热门专业持续高热、考生总数微降形成小幅正向叠加。，考虑扩 招后报考热度可能略有回升（部分考生因名额增加而积极报考），适度回调至23398名。预测最低位次约23398名，区间22898–23898名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 17414 → 17052 → 18368 → 20676 → 20247, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend, with a cumulative decline of about 3200 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 20247; the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category was 37 in 2021, 31 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 29 in 2025; the plan for 2026 increases to 37, an expansion of about 27.6% compared to 2025, significantly increasing admission slots and easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking was 109th in 2021 → 107th in 2026, steadily rising in recent years, overall at the upper-middle level nationally; no significant negative or positive events appeared in reputation documents, with stable public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 93rd, rated as 'average', with moderate attention on short video platforms and no abnormal application signals; no historical records of admission gaps; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include A- or above disciplines for this university, but it is known for engineering, with traditional advantageous disciplines such as Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Materials Science having high industry recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Computer Science (recommended) continue to see rising social popularity, matching well with the university's engineering characteristics, helping attract high-quality students; the total number of Chongqing Gaokao examinees in 2026 is about 209,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 138,000 (approximately 66% of total), slightly down by about 1% from 2025 (139,478), slightly reducing the competition base; the main campus of Hebei University of Technology is in Tianjin, making it an inter-provincial enrollment in Chongqing with no local student preference; the enrollment scale in Chongqing is small (about 37 people), so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion in Physics Category in 2026 (+27.6%) is the most critical factor affecting rankings, directly reducing competition intensity and causing a clear decline in ranking numbers; at the same time, the sustained high popularity of engineering majors and a slight decrease in total examinees create a small positive superposition. Considering that after expansion, application enthusiasm may slightly rebound (some candidates actively apply due to increased slots), a moderate adjustment to 23398 is made. The predicted minimum ranking is about 23398, with a range of 22898–23898.

It is recommended that candidates within this range focus on Tier 2 majors as their main choices, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Computer, Electronic Information) as reach targets; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (about 22500 or below) can focus on Tier 1; candidates near the upper bound can prioritize Tier 3 as safety options. The university has strong engineering characteristics, with Electrical and Computer majors offering good employment prospects.
